items.title: Pistons drop their final summer league game, 101-87, to the Miami Heat. Led by 15 in the 3rd, but gave up a late 15-0 run in the fourth in a collapse. They finish summer league 1-4 overall.

Pistons drop their final summer league game, 101-87, to the Miami Heat. Led by 15 in the 3rd, but gave up a late 15-0 run in the fourth in a collapse. They finish summer league 1-4 overall. 

Okorie: 27 points, 4 assists. Had his best performance in Vegas.

items.title: Caitlin Clark postgame to @kelsie_kasperTV: "True resiliency, but we've got another one tomorrow. So this one is great, but let's move on."
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Caitlin Clark postgame to @kelsie_kasperTV: "True resiliency, but we've got another one tomorrow. So this one is great, but let's move on."

On defense: "It was kind of an embarrassing performance on the defensive end, I'll be honest. We really got to find a way to be better."

items.title: Fever come back and hang on to escape with a 110-107 win over the Storm.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever come back and hang on to escape with a 110-107 win over the Storm.

Caitlin Clark finishes with a career-high: 45pts, 11/18 FGs, 6/10 3FGs, 17/19 FTs, and 10asts. Kelsey Mitchell scored 30.

Next: Sat. v NY

items.title: What do you even say? Caitlin Clark with 45 points and 10 assists. An unbelievable performance. She guides the Fever comeback as they beat the Storm 110-107 and improve to 15-10.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: What do you even say? Caitlin Clark with 45 points and 10 assists. An unbelievable performance. She guides the Fever comeback as they beat the Storm 110-107 and improve to 15-10.

Caitlin Clark drains her 5th 3-pointer of the game, giving her 38pts — a new career-high. She's up to 28 minutes.

Fever trailing by 1 with under 2mins to play.
